nasb.text: “They will be desolate In the midst of the desolated lands; And her cities will be In the midst of the devastated cities.

esv.text: And they shall be desolated in the midst of desolated countries, and their cities shall be in the midst of cities that are laid waste.

cnv.text: 埃及必成為荒地中的荒地， 它的城必成為廢城中的廢城。

ccb.text: 埃及要变成荒地中的荒地， 她的城邑要沦为废墟中的废墟。
